FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct PolylineStrokeSpec

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

A retained stroked polyline with normalized trim controls. Points are local DIP coordinates inside the node's box; trim values are path-distance fractions (0..1), so animation can reveal the stroke in draw order.

public readonly record struct PolylineStrokeSpec : IEquatable<PolylineStrokeSpec>
Implements
IEquatable<PolylineStrokeSpec>

Constructors

PolylineStrokeSpec(Point2, Point2, Point2, Point2, int, ColorF, float, float, float, bool)

A retained stroked polyline with normalized trim controls. Points are local DIP coordinates inside the node's box; trim values are path-distance fractions (0..1), so animation can reveal the stroke in draw order.

public PolylineStrokeSpec(Point2 P0, Point2 P1, Point2 P2, Point2 P3, int PointCount, ColorF Color, float Thickness, float TrimStart = 0, float TrimEnd = 1, bool RoundCaps = true)

PointCount int
Color ColorF
Thickness float
TrimStart float
TrimEnd float
RoundCaps bool

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
